chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Constitutional Petition No. D – 4360 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES Priority 1. For orders on office objections 1 to 4. 2. For orders on CMA No.17990/2025. 3. For haring of CMA No.17991/2025. 4. For hearing of main case. 18.09.2025 Mr. Hasnain Ejaz, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Salman Mansoor, Advocate for respondents 2 & 3. Rana Sakhawat Ali, Advocate for respondent No.4. Ms. Mehreen Ibrahim, D.A.G. -------------------------------------- The case of the petitioner is that its containers were stored in a warehouse that was leased by respondent No.2 (KPT) to respondent No.4; that pursuant to legal proceedings between said respondents, the respondent No.2 (KPT) has taken possession back from the respondent No.4 but is refusing to release the containers of the petitioner. Learned counsel for respondent No.2 (KPT) submits that there are no documents to demonstrate as goods in the warehouse are of the petitioner and therefore the respondent No.2 goes into believe that the goods are of the respondent No.4 who owes the respondent No.2 (KPT) outstanding lease handles. Learned counsel for the respondent No.4 submits that the goods are in fact of the petitioner. The petitioner has also filed GDs along with the petition to demonstrate the same. That being so, we do not see any dispute involved in the case therefore the petition is allowed in the terms that the petitioner shall provide copies of the GDs to the respondent No.2 (KPT) and upon verifying the same the respondent No.2 (KPT) shall release the goods lying in the subject warehouse to the petitioner forthwith.

The petitioner has also filed GDs along with the petition to demonstrate the same. That being so, we do not see any dispute involved in the case therefore the petition is allowed in the terms that the petitioner shall provide copies of the GDs to the respondent No.2 (KPT) and upon verifying the same the respondent No.2 (KPT) shall release the goods lying in the subject warehouse to the petitioner forthwith. The petition along with listed application is disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE JUDGE Nadeem Qureshi PA
